creator: peterjeremy@acm.org
text:
Update devel/mspdebug to latest version (0.15)
	Suggested commit message:
- Update to 0.15.
  Adds support for: MSP430G2452, MSP430F5525, MSP430F47173, MSP430F5526,
                    MSP430F2272, MSP430F2122.
  New IO peripheral simulator
  Various other bugfixes and enhancements.

How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
